title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the heck is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No idea, it looks like Kaido put on weight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is this some form of his?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Damn it!! How are you doing this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOUR body is meant to be rubbery, not mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehe!! I see a pair of bright lights!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
